title: DRDO Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: DRDO Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
DRDO Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Surat operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About DRDO Capital India:
DRDO Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DRDO Capital India!
